name: Creamy Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces lean boneless sirloin steak, trimmed and cut into strips
1/2 cup low sodium chicken broth, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add beef; sauté until browned, about 2 minutes. Place on a plate.
2. In the same skillet over medium-high heat, cook mushrooms and 1/4 cup of broth for 5 minutes. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 3 minutes. Stir in paprika until well blended. Add remaining broth; cook for 4 minutes.
3. While the mushroom mixture is simmering, cook noodles according to package directions, but do not add salt.
4. In a small bowl, combine sour cream and yogurt. Mix well; set aside. Return beef and any accumulated juices from plate to skillet; reduce heat to low and stir gently. Stir sour cream mixture into skillet; heat through.
5. Drain noodles in a colander. Place on serving plates and top with beef mixture. Sprinkle with dill and serve immediately.
